header.title: Verify Your Vote
header.subtitle: Enter your receipt code to see the candidates you voted for.

form.card_subtitle: Please enter the receipt code you received after voting.
form.instructions_body: Enter the 12-character receipt code from your confirmation page to view your votes.
form.receipt_hint: Copy this code and enter it below to verify your vote.

success.title: Vote Successfully Verified
success.subtitle: Your submitted votes are shown below.

demo_info.title: Demo Mode
demo_info.body: This is a test election. You can vote as many times as you like.
